meta_title: For Students: API integration guide to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: API Integration Guide: Debugging Code for Students
content.seo_description: Master API integration and crush debugging hurdles. A high-level checklist for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your dev journey.
content.answer_block: Debugging API integrations requires isolating the request-response cycle. Use structured logging, validate payload schemas against documentation, and leverage AI-assisted diagnostic tools like Claude Code to trace asynchronous errors. By treating APIs as external dependencies with strict contracts, you transform elusive bugs into predictable, resolvable configuration issues.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of 400-series errors, your local environment feels like a labyrinth, and the documentation you’re reading seems written in an alien tongue. The transition from 'tutorial-builder' to 'software engineer' is defined by the moment you stop fearing the stack trace and start dissecting it with surgical precision.

This isn't just about fixing a broken fetch request; it’s about mastering the architecture of data flow. By integrating Antigravity and Claude Code into your workflow, you’ll stop guessing why your code fails and start engineering resilient, professional-grade systems that handle failure gracefully.

steps.title: Establish the API Contract
steps.description: Define the expected request structure and response schema before writing a single line of implementation code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the API documentation provided. Generate a TypeScript interface for the request body and the expected success/error response objects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate interfaces for API schema provided in docs'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Middleware
steps.description: Create a wrapper for your API calls to handle retries, timeouts, and logging automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Axios interceptor or fetch wrapper that implements exponential backoff and logs all headers for debugging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/api/client.ts --instruction 'add retry logic and header logging'

steps.title: Mock the Network Layer
steps.description: Isolate your business logic from the network by mocking the API responses during development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate MSW (Mock Service Worker) handlers based on the API schema to simulate success and error scenarios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create msw handlers for the current endpoint'

steps.title: Trace Asynchronous Failures
steps.description: Use diagnostic tools to track the lifecycle of your request through the event loop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current async function for potential race conditions or unhandled promise rejections.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Verify your integration against a staging environment to catch regression before it hits production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Vitest integration test that validates the API response headers and data integrity against the defined schema.

pro_tips: Always log the raw request headers; 90% of 'cannot debug' issues are actually missing API keys or content-type mismatches.
Use Postman or Hoppscotch to confirm the API works outside your codebase before you try to implement it in your app.
Implement circuit breakers for third-party APIs to prevent your entire application from hanging when a dependency goes down.
Treat your API client as a standalone module; never mix UI logic with data fetching code.
When facing cryptic errors, ask the AI to 'explain the error as if you were the API server's logs' to gain perspective on the server-side state.
content.next_steps: Once your API integration is stable, document the failure modes you encountered and share your findings in the community Discord to help others avoid the same pitfalls.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start mastering the architecture. You have the tools, the guide, and the community waiting for your breakthrough. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
